title: Why the next computing revolution will be hybrid, human and slightly unpredictable
summary: We are, quietly, entering the age of hybrid intelligence, where classical computing, artificial intelligence , and quantum systems begin to work together. The hybrid architectures where classical systems prepare the problem, quantum executes the core computation, and classical systems interpret this result.
